description_long: This is a modern A-frame cabin with a sharply pitched triangular roof, constructed primarily from dark wood panels and featuring large glass windows on the front and rear facades. The front of the cabin showcases a full-height glass wall, providing expansive views and natural light to the interior. A spacious, striped wooden deck extends from one side of the cabin, incorporating a built-in circular fire pit as a focal point. The side elevations reveal a series of vertical wooden beams and a single, narrow window, while the rear mirrors the front with another large glass wall. The cabin is elevated slightly above the ground and is bordered by a simple metal railing on the deck. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, blending natural materials with geometric forms.
description: A modern A-frame cabin with large glass facades, dark wood cladding, and a spacious striped deck featuring a fire pit. The design is sleek, geometric, and contemporary.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full-height glass facade, triangular roof, and the striped deck with a fire pit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical wooden beams, a narrow window, and the transition between the cabin and the deck.
description_view_2: Rear view with another large glass wall, triangular roof, and the continuation of the striped deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the vertical wooden beams, deck area, and the fire pit's position on the striped surface.
attribute_roof_type: A-frame, steeply pitched, continuous wood panels with no visible overhangs or dormers
attribute_window_arrangement: Two large, full-height triangular windows on the front and rear facades; one narrow vertical window on one side; windows are asymmetrically distributed
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the side of the cabin adjacent to the deck, near the narrow window
